readings.summary: The Apostles decide not to burden the Gentiles unnecessarily.

readings.citation:
Ps 67:2-3, 5, 6, 8, R. v.4
O God, let all the nations praise you!
readings.antiphon:
Ps 67:2-3, 5, 6, 8, R. v.4
O God, let all the nations praise you!

readings.summary: An angel shows John the new Jerusalem.

Whoever loves me will keep my word, says the Lord,
and my Father will love him and we will come to him.
Jesus leaves peace as his farewell.

antiphons.text:
If you love me, keep my commandments,
says the Lord, and I will ask the Father
and he will send you another Paraclete,
to abide with you for ever, alleluia.

prelude.title: Regina Caeli / O Queen of Heaven
prelude.description: Pope Leo XIV singing Regina Caeli

gathering.title: Your Peace Will Make Us One
gathering.description: "Peace I leave with you; my peace I give to you."

penitentialAct.title: Kyrie • Misa Del Mundo
penitentialAct.composer: Only if needed. Talk to presider!
